nav_title: Center for Research in Islamic Sciences and Civilization
hero_eyebrow: Public Scientific & Technological Institution · Ministry of Higher Education & Scientific Research
hero_desc: The Center conducts theoretical and applied research in Islamic and civilizational sciences, promotes balanced knowledge dissemination, and highlights the characteristics of Arab-Islamic civilization at both national and international levels.
dept1_desc: Scientific grounding, judicial ijtihad and Islamic jurisprudence
dept2_desc: Intellectual security, tolerance and peaceful coexistence
dept3_desc: Manuscripts and national heritage of the French occupation era
dept4_desc: Highlighting the characteristics of Arab-Islamic civilization
about_hero_tag: Established by Executive Decree 15-136 on May 23, 2015
about_hero_h1: About the Center for Research in Islamic Sciences and Civilization
about_hero_p: Algeria's only national center specializing in Islamic and civilizational sciences, conducting original scientific research, training researchers and strengthening international partnerships.
about_nature_h: Nature and Establishment of the Center
about_nature_p1: The Center for Research in Islamic Sciences and Civilization in Laghouat is a public institution of a scientific and technological character, established by Executive Decree No. 15-136 of May 23, 2015, and officially inaugurated on January 27, 2016. It is the only national institution in this pioneering field.
about_nature_p2: The Center is organizationally governed by Executive Decree No. 11-396 of November 24, 2011, and is administratively affiliated with the Directorate of Scientific Research and Technological Development under the Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research in Algeria.
about_nature_p3: The Center's missions revolve around managing research projects through data collection, programming, implementation and evaluation, monitoring science and technology developments in its field, gathering technical information, valorizing research results and ensuring continuing education.
about_vision_p: To be a leading and distinguished scientific and research reference in Islamic Sciences and Civilization at both national and international levels.
about_mission_p: To conduct original scientific research in Islamic and civilizational sciences, train and qualify researchers, and provide scientific consultations and specialized expertise.
about_values_p: Scientific excellence, originality and renewal, cooperation and partnership, academic integrity, social responsibility and innovation in research.
about_goals_p: Develop scientific research in Islamic sciences, disseminate scientific output, train researchers, highlight Islamic civilization's characteristics, and address contemporary social challenges.
about_axis1: Sciences of the Holy Quran and Prophetic Hadith
about_axis2: Foundations of Islamic theology, jurisprudence and its principles
about_axis3: Contemporary Islamic thought and cultural history of Algeria
about_axis4: Civilizational studies and characteristics of Arab-Islamic civilization
about_axis5: Interfaith dialogue, tolerance and peaceful coexistence
about_strat1: Developing intellectual and religious knowledge related to major societal challenges
about_strat2: Promoting moderate thought and strengthening civilizational tolerance
about_strat3: Linking scientific research with national development needs
about_strat4: Preserving and protecting Islamic and Arab heritage from extinction
about_strat5: Establishing national and international research partnerships
about_strat6: Building specialized research competencies in Islamic and civilizational sciences
org_hero_tag: According to the decree of July 12, 2018 defining the internal organization
org_hero_p: The Center consists of a directorate, administrative and scientific councils, two technical departments, and four specialized research divisions.
research_hero_p: The Center operates with a methodological vision combining authenticity and modernity through four specialized scientific departments and eight research teams.
research_dept1_p: This department specializes in the scientific grounding of Quranic sciences, the Prophetic Sunnah, Islamic jurisprudence and its principles, and works to highlight Quranic miracles and judicial ijtihad in light of contemporary developments.
research_team1a_desc: Researches aspects of Quranic miracles in their linguistic, rhetorical, scientific and legislative dimensions, seeking to present contemporary approaches to studying the Quranic text.
research_team1b_desc: Addresses Islamic jurisprudence and its principles and methodologies of ijtihad, focusing on contemporary jurisprudential developments and the jurisprudence of novel cases.
research_dept2_h: Department of Thought, Theology & Interfaith Dialogue
research_dept2_p: Specializes in studying the system of Islamic thought, beliefs and schools of thought, and addresses issues of intellectual security, interfaith dialogue and peaceful coexistence.
research_team2a_desc: Researches methods of dialogue between civilizations, religions and cultures, and studies issues of tolerance, peaceful coexistence and mechanisms of effective dialogue.
research_team2b_desc: Studies the foundations of Islamic theology and various schools of thought, addressing intellectual security challenges in the contemporary Islamic world.
research_dept3_h: Department of Cultural History of Algeria
research_dept3_p: Specializes in studying Algeria's cultural and intellectual history, with a focus on the French occupation period (1830-1962) and efforts to preserve the national heritage and manuscripts.
research_team3a_desc: Researches Algerian manuscripts, cataloguing and digitizing them, along with the tangible and intangible cultural heritage of Algeria's southern provinces.
research_team3b_desc: Monitors and documents Algerian scientific and cultural figures throughout history, highlighting their role in preserving national identity.
research_dept4_p: Specializes in highlighting the characteristics and universal values of Arab-Islamic civilization, and researches Islamic economics, Islamic banking and sustainable development from an Islamic perspective.
research_team4a_desc: Studies Islamic civilization's contributions to building human consciousness and highlights its universal characteristics in the fields of science, arts and thought.
research_team4b_desc: Researches the foundations of Islamic economics, Islamic banking and the Waqf institution and their applications in Algeria and the Islamic world.
pubs_hero_tag: +45 scientific publications · Individual, collective works and journals
pubs_hero_p: Diverse scientific outputs addressing issues in Islamic, civilizational and social sciences through rigorous research methodologies.
events_hero_tag: International & national conferences · Lectures and academic meetings
events_hero_p: The Center organizes annual national and international academic conferences addressing current research issues and bringing together researchers and academics.
coop_hero_p: The Center seeks to build effective research partnerships with national and international institutions in Islamic and civilizational sciences.
journals_hero_tag: 4 peer-reviewed academic journals · Free open access
journals_hero_p: The Center publishes four open-access peer-reviewed journals in Islamic, social, legal and Sufi studies.
contact_hero_tag: We welcome communication and scientific cooperation
contact_hero_p: For research inquiries, scientific partnerships and communication with the Center's team, we are happy to hear from you.
